expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the run concludes the opposite of the expectation: "Verdict (retrospective): FAIL — blocking." It states the cross-section interaction audit did not catch the required interactions/states, citing template × pause-mode omission (BCIN-7730) and prompt-editor-open close/confirm issues (BCIN-7708/7709): "Template × Pause Mode interaction was missed" and "Prompt-editor-open state interaction was missed".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as a Phase 5a checkpoint enforcement evaluation and uses Phase 5a rubric requirements: title "# Phase 5a Checkpoint Enforcement — Cross‑Section Interaction Audit", and it cites `skill_snapshot/references/review-rubric-phase5a.md` plus "Primary phase under test: Phase 5a". The content focuses on the Phase 5a-required section "## Cross-Section Interaction Audit" and Phase 5a acceptance gating.
